nasb.text: This will be the sign to you,’ declares the Lord, ‘that I am going to punish you in this place, so that you may know that My words will surely stand against you for harm.’

esv.text: This shall be the sign to you, declares the Lord, that I will punish you in this place, in order that you may know that my words will surely stand against you for harm:

cnv.text: “‘我要在這地方懲罰你們，這是給你們的徵兆，好使你們知道我說要降禍給你們的話，一定實現。’這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 我必在这地方惩罚你们，我要给你们一个预兆，好叫你们知道我言出必行。这是耶和华说的。
